item.title: Finding a River Lobster
item.description: A close look at a river lobster observed in its natural habitat, highlighting Chandler’s Wild Life’s calm, educational approach to wildlife encounters

item.title: Feeding King Cobras
item.description: A close look at Chandler’s Wild Life as king cobras are fed in a controlled setting, highlighting careful animal care and observation.
